data.title: Northland Power to release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026; earnings call on Feb 26 at 10am ET.
data.description: Toronto-based Northland Power Inc. (TSX: NPI) has revealed plans to unveil its fourth quarter financial performance for 2025 after market closure on February 25, 2026. The company's management is scheduled to conduct an earnings conference call and webcast at 10 a.m. Eastern Time on February 26, 2026. This will be followed by an interactive session for analysts to ask questions regarding the results.

data.title: NVIDIA's TensorRT for RTX boosts AI performance by 1.32x on RTX 5090, bringing self-optimizing AI to consumer GPUs.
data.description: The latest development from NVIDIA involves the implementation of TensorRT for RTX, which brings adaptive inference capabilities to AI workloads. This innovation allows for automatic optimization of AI tasks during runtime, resulting in a notable performance boost of 1.32 times specifically on RTX 5090 hardware. This enhancement is aimed at enhancing the efficiency and speed of AI processing, showcasing the potential benefits of utilizing this technology in real-time scenarios.

data.title: SSR Mining to release Q4 & full-year 2025 financial results on Feb 17, 2026; conference call at 5 pm EST.
data.description: Denver-based SSR Mining Inc. (Nasdaq/TSX: SSRM) will be announcing its full-year and fourth quarter financial results for 2025 on February 17, 2026, after markets close. Additionally, the Company will reveal its full-year 2026 operating guidance along with updated Mineral Reserves and Mineral Resources. A conference call to review the results is set for 5:00 pm EST on the same day. Interested parties including investors, media, and the public are welcome to participate in the conference call.

data.title: CF Industries, POET, and co-ops launch pilot for low-carbon fertilizer to reduce ethanol production carbon intensity. #sustainability #agriculture
data.description: In Northbrook, Illinois, CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF), a prominent global producer of hydrogen and nitrogen products, and POET, the largest biofuels manufacturer globally, have initiated a pilot program in collaboration with significant agriculture co-operatives. The project aims to collectively establish a supply chain for low-carbon fertilizers. The primary objective of this pilot initiative is to showcase the effectiveness of utilizing low-carbon nitrogen fertilizers in significantly lowering the carbon footprint associated with corn production. This endeavor is envisioned to facilitate the creation of low carbon alternatives for fertilizers.

data.title: James Hardie to release FY26 Q3 earnings. Schedule includes conference call.(Location: Chicago)
data.description: Chicago-based company James Hardie has disclosed the schedule for the release of its third-quarter financial results for fiscal year 2026. The upcoming earnings release and associated conference call are set to provide stakeholders with vital insights into the company's performance. This announcement underscores the importance of transparency and communication within the business community.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to $325.7M RMBS from EFMT 2026-AE1, totaling 64 classes of certificates with 887 loans.
data.description: New York - KBRA has issued preliminary ratings for 64 categories of mortgage-backed certificates in the EFMT 2026-AE1 transaction. The RMBS deal totals $325.7 million and is sponsored by EFMT Sponsor LLC. The pool consists entirely of first liens on non-owner occupied (58.0%) and second homes (42.0%) adhering to agency standards. With 887 loans in the pool, the average seasoning is about five months. The transaction involves multiple loan originators.

data.title: Stephen Carozza gives tips on driveway expansion to avoid costly mistakes in Pittsford, N.Y. on Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: In Pittsford, New York, on January 26, 2026, experts advise homeowners to conduct thorough checks before expanding their driveways. While many view driveway expansion as an easy way to increase parking space, it requires meticulous planning to prevent expensive errors. An article in HelloNation shared insights on this topic by Stephen, emphasizing the importance of considering factors such as local regulations, drainage systems, and estimated costs. Proper preparation can help avoid unforeseen expenses and ensure a successful driveway expansion project.

data.title: First Bank's Q4 2025 net income: $12.3M, full year: $43.7M. Total loans: $3.29B, deposits: $3.20B. Increased efficiency and dividend hike.
data.description: First Bank (Nasdaq: FRBA) reported strong financial results for Q4 2025. Net income was $12.3 million, or $0.49 per diluted share, up from $10.5 million, or $0.41 per diluted share in Q4 2024. For full year 2025, net income was $43.7 million, or $1.74 per diluted share, an increase from $42.2 million, or $1.67 per diluted share in 2024. Total loans increased to $3.29 billion, deposits were at $3.20 billion. Net interest margin was 3.74% in Q4 2025. Efficiency ratio improved to 49.46%. Tangible book value per share grew to $15.81. The Bank declared quarterly dividend increase of 50% to $0.09 per share. Total assets as of December 31, 2025 were $3.96 billion. Stockholders' equity has increased to $443.5 million. The Bank's Tier 1 Leverage ratio was 9.75%. Nonperforming assets totaled $18.4 million. ROA, ROE, and ROATCE were 1.21%, 11.11%, and 12.58% respectively for Q4 2025. Management highlighted efficient pricing and balance sheet management leading to margin improvements and focus on sustainable balance sheet growth. They anticipate continued strength in 2026 and were pleased with the performance in 2025. The Bank also authorized a share repurchase program. For full financial statements, refer to the Benzinga.com link provided.

data.title: Bitmine's 2M staked Ether signal $160M annual staking rev. Treasury worth $5.7B aims to grow more.
data.description: The Ether treasury, which is traded publicly, currently holds over 2 million ETH that are staked. These holdings are estimated to be worth around $5.7 billion. The treasury has intentions to continue expanding its assets in the future.

data.title: Kelly Mahannah, President of Workforce Solutions, named to 2026 Staffing 100 North America list by SIA. #honored
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 26, 2026, Supplemental Health Care (SHC) revealed that Kelly Mahannah, President of Workforce Solutions, has been selected for the esteemed 2026 Staffing Industry Analysts (SIA) Staffing 100 North America list. This recognition is a significant achievement in the staffing industry and acknowledges Mahannah's outstanding contributions. The Staffing 100 North America list is known for highlighting top professionals in the field, and Mahannah's inclusion is a testament to her expertise and leadership. This recognition highlights her dedication and expertise in the industry, showcasing her as a standout leader.

data.title: First Community Bankshares, Inc. acquires Hometown Bancshares, Inc. and Union Bank, Inc. merger effective January 23, 2026.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, First Community Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCBC) announced the successful acquisition of Hometown Bancshares, Inc. and its subsidiary, Union Bank, Inc. The transaction was finalized on January 23, 2026, following the merger agreement announced on July 19, 2025. First Community Bankshares, Inc. is the parent company of First Community Bank, while Hometown Bancshares, Inc. is a significant player in the industry. This acquisition marks a strategic move for First Community Bankshares, Inc. as they aim to expand their presence and offerings in the market.

data.title: Nifty Gateway, a key NFT Platform, will shut down in February, impacting the art world and collectors.
data.description: In February, Gemini's Nifty Gateway platform, known for driving early interest in digital art NFTs, will be shutting down.

data.title: KBRA assigns ratings to BRSP 2026-FL3 CRE CLO: collaterized by 29 loans, $856.7M balance, $98.3M cash collateral.
data.description: In New York, credit rating agency KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to eight classes of BRSP 2026-FL3, a managed CRE CLO securitization. This securitization allows for reinvestment of principal proceeds for 30 months with a 180-day ramp-up period. Initially, it will be backed by 29 mortgage loans totaling $856.7 million as of the cutoff date, with an additional $98.3 million in cash collateral for acquiring ramp assets. The transaction offers significant opportunities for growth and diversification within the commercial real estate sector.

data.title: Stewart Information Services Corp to discuss Q4 and full year 2025 earnings on Feb 5 at 8:30 am EST. Dial (800) 274-8461 for USA, (203) 518-9814 for Int'l - access code STCQ425.
data.description: Houston-based Stewart Information Services Corporation (NYSE:STC) has scheduled a conference call for Thursday, February 5, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss their fourth quarter and full year 2025 earnings. The company will report its earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, February 4. To join the call, participants can dial (800) 274-8461 (USA) or (203) 518-9814 (International) using the access code STCQ425. The conference call will also be available for replay.
